CLM-2026-0041.subject: Claim Intimation — JCB 3DX Backhoe Loader (OD-02-BQ-7734) — Policy POL-IL-20260041
CLM-2026-0041.body:
Dear Sir/Madam,

We are writing to intimate a claim under the above-referenced policy. Details as follows:

Policy No: POL-IL-20260041
Insured Vehicle: JCB 3DX Backhoe Loader
Registration: OD-02-BQ-7734
Claimant: Rajesh Kumar Patel
Date of Incident: 17 March 2026
Location: Chandaka Industrial Area, Bhubaneswar, Odisha

Nature of Incident:
The vehicle tipped over at a construction site during excavation work, resulting in damage to the hydraulic arm and cabin structure.

Estimated Loss: Rs. 2,40,000/-

We request you to kindly register this claim and assign a surveyor at the earliest. All supporting documents including site photographs (8 nos.) and operator statement have been uploaded to our portal.

This intimation is being made within 24 hours of the incident as per IRDAI guidelines.

Regards,
ClaimPilot AI Claims System
Equifi Financial Services
Bhubaneswar, Odisha
Ref: CLM-2026-0041 | Loan A/c: EQF-LN-2024-1187

CLM-2026-0041.subject: Document Request — CLM-2026-0041 — JCB 3DX (OD-02-BQ-7734)
CLM-2026-0041.body:
Dear Sir/Madam,

With reference to the above claim, I am the appointed surveyor for inspection of the JCB 3DX Backhoe Loader (OD-02-BQ-7734).

Kindly arrange the following documents before the inspection date:

1. Original RC Book (Registration Certificate)
2. Valid Driving License of the operator at time of incident
3. Insurance Policy copy
4. Fitness Certificate of the vehicle
5. Permit/Registration for commercial use
6. Operator's written statement about the incident
7. Site supervisor's statement
8. Any CCTV footage if available

I propose to inspect the vehicle on 27 March 2026 at the site location. Please confirm availability.

Regards,
M.K. Rao
M.K. Rao & Associates
IRDAI Licensed Surveyor

CLM-2026-0042.subject: Claim Intimation — Tata Signa 4825.TK Tipper (OD-14-AB-3391) — Policy POL-BA-20260042
CLM-2026-0042.body:
Dear Sir/Madam,

We are writing to intimate a motor insurance claim under the above-referenced policy. This is a PRIORITY claim involving a highway accident.

Policy No: POL-BA-20260042
Insured Vehicle: Tata Signa 4825.TK Tipper
Registration: OD-14-AB-3391
Claimant: Suresh Mohanty
Date of Incident: 25 March 2026
Time: Approx. 06:45 AM
Location: NH-16, near Balasore, Odisha

Nature of Incident:
Front collision with road divider on National Highway 16. Significant damage to cabin and chassis structure. The driver sustained minor injuries and has been treated at a local hospital.

Estimated Loss: Rs. 3,85,000/-

FIR Details:
FIR No: FIR-BLS-2026-0312
Police Station: Balasore PS

Note: As this involves a highway accident with FIR, we request expedited processing as per IRDAI Motor Claims guidelines. The vehicle is currently at the accident site and needs to be towed.

All available documents including FIR copy and initial photographs have been uploaded to our claims portal.

Regards,
ClaimPilot AI Claims System
Equifi Financial Services
Bhubaneswar, Odisha
Ref: CLM-2026-0042 | Loan A/c: EQF-LN-2025-0234

CLM-2026-0042.body:
Dear Team,

We acknowledge receipt of your claim intimation dated 25-03-2026.

Your claim has been registered under reference: BA/MTR/CLM/2026/11923

As this is a highway accident case with FIR involvement, we are processing this on priority. However, we require the following before surveyor assignment:

1. Certified copy of FIR (FIR-BLS-2026-0312)
2. Driver's medical report
3. Vehicle towing receipt
4. Photographs of accident scene and vehicle damage

Please submit these documents within 7 days to avoid any delay in processing.

Surveyor assignment will be communicated once the above documents are received.

Regards,
Motor Claims Department
Bajaj Allianz General Insurance Co. Ltd.

CLM-2026-0038.subject: Survey Report — Ashok Leyland Dost+ (OD-05-CD-9987) — HE/MTR/2026/07834
CLM-2026-0038.body:
Dear Sir/Madam,

Please find attached the survey report for the above-referenced claim.

Survey Summary:
- Date of Inspection: 14 March 2026
- Location: Chandikhole, Jajpur
- Vehicle Condition: Damage consistent with rear-end collision

Damage Assessment:
1. Rear bumper — Complete replacement required: Rs. 12,500
2. Tailgate assembly — Replacement required: Rs. 28,000
3. Cargo bed repair — Denting & painting: Rs. 18,000
4. Rear light cluster — Replacement: Rs. 6,400
5. Labour charges: Rs. 7,500

Total Assessed: Rs. 72,400/-

Note: Minor pre-existing damage observed on left body panel (unrelated to this incident). This has been excluded from the assessment.

Recommendation: Claim is genuine. Cashless repair recommended at authorized/network garage.

Detailed report with photographs attached.

Regards,
S.P. Dash
S.P. Dash Surveyors
IRDAI Licensed Surveyor

CLM-2026-0038.subject: Cashless Repair Approved — Ashok Leyland Dost+ (OD-05-CD-9987) — HE/MTR/2026/07834
CLM-2026-0038.body:
Dear Team,

With reference to the above claim, we are pleased to inform you that cashless repair has been approved based on the surveyor's report.

Approval Details:
Approved Amount: Rs. 72,400/-
Repair Type: Cashless
Approved Workshop: Any HDFC ERGO network garage in Odisha

Conditions:
1. Repairs must commence within 15 days of this approval
2. Workshop must submit pre-repair and post-repair photographs
3. Original replaced parts must be preserved for 30 days
4. Any additional damage found during repair must be reported before proceeding

Please share this approval letter with the workshop. The workshop can raise the bill directly with us.

Regards,
Motor Claims Department
HDFC ERGO General Insurance Co. Ltd.

CLM-2026-0035.subject: Survey Report — Komatsu PC210 (OD-02-BQ-5521) — ICL/CLM/2026/02/04567
CLM-2026-0035.body:
Dear Sir/Madam,

Please find attached the survey report for the above claim.

Inspection Date: 5 March 2026
Location: Khurda Quarry, Odisha

Damage Assessment:
1. Bucket teeth and cutting edge: Rs. 35,000
2. Track chain assembly (partial): Rs. 42,000
3. Track roller replacement (2 nos.): Rs. 18,000
4. Labour and fitting: Rs. 10,000

Gross Assessed Amount: Rs. 1,05,000/-
Less: Depreciation on rubber/plastic parts (as per IRDAI schedule): Rs. 6,500
Net Assessed Amount: Rs. 98,500/-

Note: The undercarriage shows signs of heavy usage consistent with quarry operations. The damage is consistent with the reported incident. No indication of negligence or wear-and-tear beyond normal operational use.

Recommendation: Claim is genuine. Suggest settlement at Rs. 98,500/-.

Regards,
M.K. Rao
M.K. Rao & Associates
